message:
fix(vtab,connection,codegen): virtual table cursor NullRow semantics, register-based VFilter, streaming table functions, expression-index EXPLAIN output

Virtual table cursor correctness overhaul:
- Add null_row synthetic state to VtabCursorState so NullRow opcode
  properly forces NULL returns from VColumn/Rowid and triggers IfNullRow
  jumps -- previously vtab cursors did not honor NullRow semantics
- VFilter opcode now reads idx_num, argc, and argv from registers
  (P3, P3+1, P3+2..) instead of P4/P5, with idx_str via P4 string,
  aligning with SQLite's register-based calling convention
- VCheck writes to P2 (not P3) preventing clobbering of integrity-check arg
- VColumn on missing/null-row cursor writes NULL instead of being a no-op
- VFilter on missing cursor jumps to empty target instead of falling through

Table-valued function improvements:
- Table functions (e.g. generate_series) now expose hidden rowid column
  through join column map and projection paths enabling SELECT gs.rowid
- New try_execute_streaming_table_function_select provides streaming
  single-source scan with WHERE/LIMIT/OFFSET pushdown avoiding full
  materialization
- table_function_result_column_names consults vtab factory column_info
  before falling back to built-in names
- Window function path unified: non-table single sources (subqueries,
  table functions) now use join-style column map, FROM-less windows
  produce implicit single row

Planner directive enrichment:
- SelectPlannerDirective replaced index_column with richer fields:
  index_key_label, index_key_is_expression, index_equality_target,
  index_range_target -- lets codegen consume planner-extracted probe
  expressions directly for expression indexes
- EXPLAIN QUERY PLAN now reports <expr>=? for expression-index lookups
  matching SQLite output

Additional fixes:
- Connection pool peak metrics: measurement_window_ms,
  peak_open_connections, peak_active_transactions via atomic counters
- generate_series(N) single-arg form supported, STEP=0 treated as 1
- JSON arrow operators renamed to json_extract/json_extract_text
- VACUUM replace_database_file uses copy_file instead of read-into-memory
- host_fs::copy_file added to VFS layer

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
